message:
feat(freeze): Convert bitwise, comparison, type checks, and array ops to Zig

Added helper methods for common operation patterns:
- emitBinaryFuncOp: Binary ops calling QuickJS functions (bitwise)
- emitUnaryFuncOp: Unary ops calling QuickJS functions
- emitBinaryCmpOp: Binary comparisons returning boolean
- emitTypeCheckOp: Type checks returning boolean

Converted operations:
- Bitwise: shl, sar, shr, and, or, xor, not (7 ops)
- Logical: lnot with special handling for boolean conversion
- Comparison: lt, lte, gt, gte, eq, neq, strict_eq, strict_neq (8 ops)
- Type checks: is_undefined, is_null, is_undefined_or_null, typeof_is_undefined, typeof_is_function (5 ops)
- Post inc/dec: post_inc, post_dec with dual push pattern (2 ops)
- Array access: get_array_el, get_array_el2, put_array_el, get_length (4 ops)

All operations now generate proper Zig code with:
- stack[@intCast(sp)] instead of POP()/PUSH() macros
- qjs. prefix for all QuickJS functions
- Proper type conversions (c_int for bool results)
